//! @yah:handoff("Sub-ticket round complete. T1 (handoff): macOS proc-macro stage clean, full build now blocked by unrelated R024-T1 WIP in app/tauri/src/state.rs; Linux deferred to T3 CI. Remaining failure is unrelated to R014 — in-progress R024-T1 work in app/tauri/src/state.rs introduced a HashMap-based AppState whose call sites in lib.rs, commands.rs, event_bridge.rs were not updated.
